---
title: 'Curses'
date: '2014-04-25T18:41:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7398394680111853922'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/curses.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Psalm 109:18 NIV<br />
<br />
<br />
He wore cursing as his garment; it entered into his body like water, into his bones like oil.<br />
<br />
<br />
